_comment: XML document manifest for the TEI Gallery. Edited by hand; scripts/build-catalog.mjs reads this and each tei.xml to generate docs/catalog.json. `bundled` documents live under docs/xml/<id>/tei.xml; `remote` documents are fetched live (the host must allow CORS). `fallback` metadata is used only when the remote fetch fails at generation time.

fallback.title: 大般若波羅蜜多經 ほか（酉蓮社 / NDL古典籍OCR）
fallback.description: 酉蓮社（u-renja）プロジェクトのオンライン TEI。NDL古典籍OCR で生成。「酉蓮社 翻刻ビュー」XSL 向け。/ Online TEI from the Yūrensha (u-renja) project, generated by NDL classical-book OCR.
